title: Fix heartbeat ideation dedup to check closed issues

log.context: Fix heartbeat ideation dedup to check closed issues

Done. Here's what was changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/scripts/heartbeat_ideation.py`

Added a `is_duplicate_finding()` function that runs two sequential `gh issue list` calls before any finding is printed:
1. `--state open` — existing check (open issues with the `idea` label matching the finding text)
2. `--state closed` — new check (recently-closed issues matching the same search term)
